title: delissea undulata subsp. niihauensis
intro: Delissea undulata subsp. niihauensis, also known as Niihau holly or Niihau delissea, is a rare and endemic species of flowering plant that belongs to the Gesneriaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used by Native Hawaiians for its medicinal properties, including its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant is believed to offer several health benefits, such as reducing fever and relieving respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and demulcent properties. In herbal preparations, Delissea undulata subsp. niihauensis is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and may also be employed in topical applications for skin issues and wounds.
